name: egyptian_arabic_content_master
description: Humanized Egyptian Arabic (Masri) for web, blogs, ads, social, video VO/supers, B2B comms, storytelling, and humour—plus channel playbooks, contracts/brief_schema + pack_router_map, evaluation rubric + golden pairs, vertical packs (hospitality, realestate, health, ecommerce, education, F&B, SaaS, fintech), legal-adjacent UX guardrails (not a substitute for counsel). Parent MENA umbrella: arabic_content_master. Bilingual prompt templates in prompt_library/en/.
author: AIWF
